name: Sausage Cheese & Egg Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place croutons on the bottom of a greased casserole dish.
2. Top with 1 1/2 cups of cheese.
3. Brown and drain sausage, then place on top of the cheese.
4. Beat eggs with milk and seasonings, and pour over the top.
5. Refrigerate overnight.
6. Next day: Dilute soup with 1/2 cup milk.
7. Pour the diluted soup mixture over the casserole.
8. Spread remaining 1/2 cup of cheese on top.
9. Bake at 300°F for 1 1/2 hours.
